title: Implement infra/cloud packs (03c): terraform, pulumi, ansible, aws, gcp, azure
description:
Implement all 6 planned infrastructure and cloud packs from plan 03c-packs-infra-cloud.md. Currently 0% implemented.

Packs to implement:
- infrastructure.terraform: IaC state manipulation, workspace deletion, provider removal
- infrastructure.pulumi: Stack destruction, state manipulation
- infrastructure.ansible: Playbook execution with destructive modules
- cloud.aws: CLI operations on critical services (EC2, S3, IAM, RDS, Lambda, etc.)
- cloud.gcp: gcloud operations on critical resources
- cloud.azure: az CLI operations on critical resources

Total: 17 safe rules + 58 destructive rules = 75 rules.

Create: internal/packs/infrastructure/ and internal/packs/cloud/ directories.
Include: Per-pack source files, golden file entries (132 planned), per-pack unit tests, pack registrations.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Reviewed by dcg-reviewer. P1: CI Tier 1/2 golden path broken after e2etest move. P3: stale docs. Infra/cloud packs correct. Completed in commit 46ff4b5, P1 fix tracked in c9c.9.
